Saturn is alone in Virgo with the Sun Jupt

IMPORTANT CHARTS 309
When Jupiter transits Libra and Scorpio at 33-34, he will possess land and
obtain good yield from it. Between 34-37 his mother also will pass away.
After 40 the native will open a new chapter in fife, construct a new house and
live happily thereafter.
CHART 469
Here the Sun and Venus are
